name: Sayo in a bunny suit (Library of Ruina)
description:
"Que Sera sera, Whatever will be, will be. The future is not ours to see, Que Sera sera."

[Well aren't you a big shot now? You're a high ranking member of the Thumb, and today you're on punishment duty. The Kurokumo clan has botched a job hard, and their failure must be made an example of. As you're in your little office, you find to hear that the captain of the clan, Sayo, is asking for audience with you. It's not often guilty thumb members present themselves to get a more lenient punishment, so you let them in to talk....and well...She's wearing a bunny suit of all things, and looking like she's about to explode from embarrassment and a twinge of fear. Her words makes her intentions obvious enough, that she'll act as 'personal entertainment' if you are willing to show even an ounce of mercy to their group. Well, the decision is up to you, chief, death or life for the girl?]

Yeah uh... This was made because holy fuck neuron reaction activated when I saw shig cook this art, like god motherfuckin damn.

Right anyway this is the ver with fishnets because.... Yes.

Strawpage:

-Its the shit association with the girl I thought was a man for all this time!!!!! I love pm making women look like men and men looking like women!!!!

Artist: Shigezie0

Tags: Project moon, library of ruina, Yakuza, Japanese woman, uhhh bunny, playboy bunny suit, bribery, uhhhh idk.
